address.Address: DLF Phase 5, Sector 53, Gurugram, Haryana 122001, India

address.streetAddress: DLF Phase 5, Sector 53, Gurugram, Haryana 122001, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: The worst school in Gurgaon that one can perhaps go to. They are extremely corrupt and have no disciplinary policies at school. My son is in grade 10 at the school and has been bullied since the time he joined. The school has no anti-bullying policy. They just come up with the standard replies which they copy-paste from the internet and have allowed the perpetrators to be a part of the school without taking any action. As they don't have many students they are too scared to dispel even a single one as that means losing out on money. The most shocking part is to see the worst kind of abusive language being encouraged in the classroom. My child is in grade 10 so it's difficult for me to pull him out but this is our last year at this school. The teachers in the middle school are not qualified for the job. They tell us that our older child needs counselling and are charging us a heavy amount every quarter for some speed program which they haven't even taken a single class of this year. My younger child is one of the brightest student on at school but the school has nothing in place to provide her more platforms to showcase her talent. Please do your research thoroughly before joining this school. Do not get carried away by the facilities and infrastructure because, in reality, your child will not be using most of these resources. If you need any information, kindly reply to this post  I can personally share my number to provide you a complete account of the practices that happen in this school.

Not recommendable for non indian. communication deadful, facilities nice on outlook but rotten inside. food are very awful and gives leftover food from the last day. nepotism and racist but completely ignored by the administration. hundred percent not worth the fee amount and called as international school.
Admission department miss kakkar is nice only on first day of admission.
pyp headmistress MS Annabelle is not professional on the duties and will ignore all small request.
i have wasted two three years of my kids by sending in this school.
please dont make mistakes new parents.
im sad i had no knowledge about this school before admission.

I have two kids at lancers and honestly the one thing I can say about the experience is I totally regret putting them in this school.
Specially being foreign, they completely very partiality about it and didn’t seem to give much attention to our request and favour.
It is just a school with good infrastructure but food are not up to the mark. AC doesn’t work sometimes. Headmistress Ms Annabelle and other authorities are completely sugar coated. They will never say no to your request but always give a nice sugar coated refusal every time you ask favour.
So I will be taking my kids out in one two years as I have just got them in lancers and I don’t wanna waste the huge  donation amount that was paid for two kids.

Do not send your children to this school!  Communication dreadful, facilities nice on the surface but terrible in reality.  Food awful.  Focused on appearances and not on substance.  Nepotism and bullying rife and unchecked by administration.  Not welcoming to non Indian pupils, does not deserve to be called an international school.

Perfect place for future kids to start a new way of learning. Lancers has one of the best faculty in terms of quality. Always has the best interest of the students at heart.

Excellent Infrastructure and one of the best learning environments for students. You have to walk in the school to feel its environment, its international and all you see are happy kids around. Being part of the school, feels like being part of an extended global family. If you want a true international education for your child, you should definitely look at this school.
